kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.name: Verify Owner Sign In Successfully when user inputs correct credentials

kw.name: When user enters Owner User ID
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When user click on Sign In button and send Owner valid credentials
Get Library Instance
kw.doc: Returns the currently active instance of the specified library.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Clear Persistent Storage
kw.msg: Cleared all persistent storage and in-memory buffers
kw.doc: Clear persistent storage file and in-memory storage to avoid getting old cached requests.

kw.name: Start Network Interception
kw.doc: Enable network and performance logging, inject JS hooks, and clear buffers.

kw.name: Clear Intercepted Requests
kw.doc: Clear in-memory buffers and sessionStorage hooks buffer.

kw.name: And user clicks Sign In button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Persistent Storage
kw.msg: Cleared all persistent storage and in-memory buffers

kw.name: Wait For Request
kw.doc: Wait until a request matching endpoint (substring) and optional method appears. Returns request dict with url, method, headers, payload, status, response, timestamp.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Stop Network Interception
kw.doc: Stop listening (does not clear persisted data).

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Then user should see Report menu
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
